title: rhamnus lycioides subsp. velutina
intro: Rhamnus lycioides subsp. velutina, also known as velvety buckthorn, is a plant species within the buckthorn family native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, which contribute to its various health benefits. The plant is said to help alleviate conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote overall well-being. In herbal preparations, Rhamnus lycioides subsp. velutina can be found in the form of tea, tinctures, or infusions, often used to support immune function and combat infections.
